home.name: Dain Jung
home.bio1: Hi there! I'm a Builder and AI Product Specialist based in Korea. With experience across data-driven SaaS work and ERP-focused AI Agent development, I'm passionate about turning complex information into intuitive, accessible experiences.
home.bio2_bold: AI-powered content automation and multi-channel publishing
home.bio2_suffix: , exploring how creators and teams can achieve more with less effort.
home.bio3: In my free time, I enjoy reading and collecting new perspectives that inspire how I design and shape better product experiences.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Constantly Challenging Myself to Nudge the World 0.1° in a Positive Direction.
about.intro: Hello, I am Daino, a Builder who defines problems and experiments with solutions. I focus on the "Value" technology creates rather than the technology itself. I feel the greatest happiness when something I've built touches someone's life and provides real help.

work.title: My Work
work.description1: My work begins with the intention to build products that are intelligent, meaningful, and genuinely useful. With experience across data-driven SaaS, AI agents, and product experimentation, I focus on reshaping complex problems into simple and clear user experiences. Above all, I prioritize defining
work.outroStart: Curiosity and a desire to explore new possibilities guide my approach. Whether I'm designing AI workflows, refining product experiences, or structuring early-stage concepts, my goal is to create work that delivers real value in the real world. This principle shapes everything I build.
work.outroEnd: If you'd like to connect for work queries or collaborations, please do
work.outroEnd2: . I also write a weekly newsletter to share my experiences. Do join if you'd like to read more about my adventures.

blog.title: My Blog
blog.description1: This space is where I document what I'm learning and building. I share reflections from my journey in AI, product development, and data work, along with perspectives shaped by the books that continue to expand my curiosity.
blog.description2: As technology and creativity evolve rapidly, I use this space to capture the decisions, questions, and insights that shape my path. I hope these notes offer a spark of inspiration for anyone exploring a similar direction.
blog.noPosts: No posts yet. Check back soon!

newsletter.title: Subscribe to my Newsletter
newsletter.description: Sign up to stay updated about my latest work and adventures.
